eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Mississippi; at 6:14 PM on FEB 5, 2019 Effective until 7:14 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The Mississippi Bureau of Investigation has issued an AMBER ALERT for 2 year old Genisis McCord of Pascagoula, Jackson County, Mississippi.  Genisis is described as a black female 2 feet tall unknown weight with brown eyes and black hair.  Genisis was last seen about 5:15 p.m. at Bandywood Apartments wearing unknown clothing.  Genisis is accompanied by her father, Joe Quincy McCord.  Joe Quincy McCord is described as a black 28-year-old male, 5�9�, 220 lbs, with brown eyes and black hair. The vehicle being used is a 2018 gray or gold Ford Fusion bearing Alabama license plate 2CC 5166.  McCord is considered armed and dangerous.  If anyone has information regarding the whereabouts of Genisis or Joe Quincy McCord or the vehicle contact the Mississippi Bureau of Investigation at 855 642 5378.
